_meta.description: Master schema for the Peptide Information Dashboard knowledge base. Every peptide entry must conform to this structure.

scoring_notes.tier1_description: Human RCTs, peer-reviewed journals, registered clinical trials, meta-analyses. Gold standard — verifiable, replicable science.
scoring_notes.tier2_description: Animal studies, in-vitro research, off-label human use with published case data, promising preclinical findings. Evidence exists but human consensus not yet established.
scoring_notes.tier3_description: Aggregated user/community reports, forum consensus, anecdotal benefit and side-effect tracking. Weighted at 25% — directionally useful, not scientifically conclusive.

_peptide_template.id: string — snake_case unique identifier e.g. semaglutide
_peptide_template.name: string — primary name
alt_names: array of brand names, alternate identifiers, abbreviations
_peptide_template.category: string — one of: glp1_metabolic | recovery_repair | gh_axis | longevity | cognitive_neuro | sexual_health | metabolic_fatloss | immune
tags: array — cross-category searchable tags e.g. weight_loss, anti_aging, neuroprotection

mechanism.simple: string — plain English, max 2 sentences. For non-technical users.
mechanism.technical: string — full mechanistic description including receptor targets, pathways, downstream effects.

formats_available_sa.notes: string — e.g. 'Available as pen and vial; most SA vendors stock 6mg and 10mg vials'

sahpra.status: string — one of: registered | scheduled_unregistered | unscheduled | not_evaluated | banned
registered_products: array of registered product names if any
sahpra.notes: string — practical context for SA users

fda.status: string — one of: approved | phase3 | phase2 | phase1 | ind_filed | preclinical | not_evaluated | banned

regulatory.overall_legal_context_sa: string — plain-language summary of where this peptide sits legally for a South African user

active_trials.name: string
active_trials.status: string — recruiting | active | completed | suspended | withdrawn

anticipated_approvals.basis: string — what data this estimate is based on

tier1.human_trial_count: number — approximate number of human trials
tier1.summary: string — 2–4 sentence synthesis of what the human science shows

key_findings.source: string — Author et al., Journal, Year

meta_analyses: array of any meta-analyses or systematic reviews
tier1.consensus_statement: string — what the scientific community currently agrees on

off_label_human_uses: array — documented off-label uses with any supporting data
promising_areas: array — areas showing early preclinical promise worth watching

tier3.summary: string — synthesis of community/user report consensus

reported_benefits.frequency: string — very common | common | occasional | rare (by report volume)

tier3.community_sentiment: string — overall tone: very positive | positive | mixed | cautious | negative
tier3.contradiction_flag: boolean — true if Tier 3 reports significantly contradict Tier 1/2 science
tier3.contradiction_notes: string — describe the contradiction if flagged

efficacy_by_domain.domain: string — e.g. Weight Loss, GI Healing, Cognitive Function

precautions: array — use with caution in these populations

serious: array — regardless of frequency, clinically significant

safety_flags: array — prominent warnings to surface in UI e.g. 'Not for use in pregnancy'

dosing_context.disclaimer: For informational/research purposes only. Not medical advice.
dosing_context.typical_research_protocols: string — general ranges seen in literature, not a prescription
administration_route: array — subcutaneous | intramuscular | oral | intranasal | topical

sources.type: string — journal | trial_registry | regulatory_doc | review | community
sources.title: string

_peptide_template.data_confidence: string — high | medium | low — overall confidence in completeness of this entry
